summary: Iteration 34: Verified 7 UX improvements to the Discovery section. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Sticky section nav bar visible at top with all section pills (IPAM, Internal DNS, External DNS, DHCP, Services, Microsoft Management, Asset/Network Insight, Security, Professional Services) - PASS
2. Click on section pill scrolls to that section and highlights the pill - PASS
3. Collapsible sections with chevron toggle work - click to collapse/expand section content - PASS
4. Clear button visible on each section header next to On/Off toggle - PASS
5. Section toggle Off shows 'Out of Scope' notification toast and dims content - PASS
6. QPS auto-fill - 'Queries per second rate, aggregate' shows ⚡Auto badge with auto-calculated value (834) - PASS
7. QPS auto-fill - 'Queries per second rate, per server' shows ⚡Auto badge with aggregate/servers calculation (834) - PASS
8. DDNS prefix number field with < checkbox visible, defaulting to <1 with green checked checkbox - PASS
9. External DNS vendor multiselect dropdown with all vendors (Microsoft, BIND, Bluecat, EIP, Akamai, AT&T, Cloudflare, GoDaddy, NS1, Dyn, ClouDNS, Route53, Google Cloud DNS) - PASS
10. External DNS multiselect has 'Add other...' freeform option - PASS
11. DHCP redundancy in NIOS mode shows only FO option - PASS
12. DHCP redundancy in UDDI mode shows AAP, AP, AA options (no FO) - PASS
13. DHCP redundancy in Hybrid mode shows all 4 options (FO, AAP, AP, AA) - PASS
14. Save button works - 'Saved' toast appears with 'All changes saved successfully' - PASS
15. Section nav bar shows question count (e.g., IPAM 6/18, Internal DNS 3/11) - PASS
16. Active section pill highlighted with primary color when clicked - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: AssessmentQuestions.jsx: Clean implementation of all 7 UX improvements with proper data-testids
Section nav bar is sticky (z-20) with proper scroll behavior
QPS auto-calculation uses formula: aggregate = IPs/3, per-server = aggregate/servers (defined in AUTO_CALC_DEFAULTS)
DHCP redundancy dynamically switches options based on platformMode from DiscoveryContext
External DNS multiselect in questions.js includes all required vendor options
DDNS prefix field type 'prefixNumber' correctly handles < checkbox with number input
context_for_next_testing_agent: 7 UX improvements verified in Discovery section: (1) Collapsible sections with chevron toggle (independent of On/Off) - click chevron in section header to collapse/expand. (2) Active section visual prominence - clicking nav pill highlights it with primary color. (3) Sticky section nav bar at top with pill buttons showing section names and question counts. (4) QPS auto-fill with ⚡Auto badge (aggregate = IPs/3, per-server = aggregate/servers). (5) DDNS prefix number field with < checkbox (data-testid='prefix-number-idns-5'). (6) External DNS vendor multiselect (data-testid='multiselect-trigger-edns-0') with Akamai, AT&T, Cloudflare, GoDaddy, NS1, Dyn, ClouDNS, Route53, Google Cloud DNS options. (7) DHCP redundancy dynamic options based on platform mode - NIOS shows FO only, UDDI shows AAP/AP/AA, Hybrid shows all 4. Platform mode is changed in Sizing tab Deployment Model selector.

collapsible_sections.description: Click chevron/arrow on section header to collapse/expand content, independent of On/Off toggle

active_section_visual.description: Clicking nav pill scrolls to section and highlights pill with primary color

sticky_nav_bar.description: Sticky nav bar at top with pill buttons for all sections

ddns_prefix.description: < checkbox with number input, defaults to <1

save_functionality.description: Save button shows success toast 'Saved - All changes saved successfully'
